#  Configure Settings: Change Orders 
##  Background 
The configuration settings for the project's Change Orders tool gives you the ability customize change order reasons, change order types, and change order statuses.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Change Orders tool


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Enable the Change Orders Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/tutorials/enable-the-change-orders-tool)


##  Steps 
You can perform the following configuration tasks:
  * Configure Change Order Settings
  * Set User Permissions for the Change Orders Tool


### Configure Change Order Settings
  1. Navigate to the project's **Change Orders** tool.
  2. Click the **Configure Settings** ![Icons Settings Gear](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8d4e4403c0eed73423d93c414c08e3a6/35b17d2e5497c876221891c1d9e5a114/icons-settings-gear.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  3. Under **Change Order Settings** , do the following:  
  
![Change Order Settings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5694b9016656e1df54bf058d67bbcb2a/c6ada56d56a1686816919a916d3df2df/change-order-settings.png?fm=webp)  

     * **Show Line Items on Prime Contract Change Order PDFs** * To show line items on PCCOs exported PDFs, mark this checkbox.* To hide line items from PCCOs exported PDFs, remove the mark from this checkbox.
     * **Show Line Items on Commitment Change Order PDFs** * To show line items on an exported PDF for a CCO, mark this check box.* To hide line items from an exported PDF for a CCO, remove the mark from this check box.
     * **Change Reason Behavior**   
To modify the change reason behavior always contact your Procore point of contact first. You have these options:* **Drop-down list of pre-defined reasons**. Provides users with the ability to select change reasons from a drop-down list. See [Set the Default Change Management Configurations](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/set-the-default-change-management-configurations) and [What are the different change order tier settings in Project Financials?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-different-change-order-tier-settings-in-project-financials)* **Freeform text field**. Allows users to enter any additional information in a text entry field.
  4. Click **Update**.


### Set User Permissions for the Change Orders Tool
#####  Notes
  * If you have a small number of users, you might choose to manage user permissions for the project's Change Orders tool using the steps below.
  * If you have a large number of users, it is recommended that you manage user permissions on Procore's project tools using permission templates. For instructions, see [Create a Project Permission Template](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/create-a-project-permissions-template).


  1. Navigate to the project's **Change Orders** tool.
  2. Click the **Configure Settings** ![Icons Settings Gear](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8d4e4403c0eed73423d93c414c08e3a6/35b17d2e5497c876221891c1d9e5a114/icons-settings-gear.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  3. Click **Permissions Table**.
  4. Set each user's permission for the tool according to your preferences.
     * ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12) Access
     * ![Icon Permissions No Access X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cdaab801833cf04cee09180aa0f2fef6/a31acd56ba44c1549cf2605afba18b8d/red-x.png?fm=webp&h=12) No Access  
 _Note_ : To view a complete list of available tasks by permission level, see [Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/permissions).
  5. When finished, click **Back**.


## See Also
  * [What are custom fields and which Procore tools support them?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-custom-fields-and-which-procore-tools-support-them)
  * [Change Orders - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/permissions)
  * [What are the different change order tier settings in Project Financials?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-different-change-order-tier-settings-in-project-financials)
title: Configure Settings: Change Orders
description: How to configure advanced settings for your project's Change Orders tool.
